questions.title: binary search
questions.notes:
Binary Search works on sorted arrays.

Steps:
1. Take two pointers: low = 0, high = n-1
2. Find mid = (low + high) / 2
3. If target == arr[mid] → return index
4. If target < arr[mid] → search left (high = mid - 1)
5. If target > arr[mid] → search right (low = mid + 1)

Repeat until found or low > high.

Key point:
Array must be sorted.
